common.server_only: This action can only be used inside a server.
common.manage_server_required: You need Manage Server permission to use administration.
common.command_server_only: This command can only be used inside a server.
common.manage_server_setup_required: You need Manage Server permission to set up administration.
common.manage_server_channels_required: You need Manage Server permission to change bot channels.

main.title: Administration
main.description: Use the buttons below to open private administration panels.

settings.title: App settings
settings.description: Select bot language, channels used by persistent bot messages, and chat command shortcuts.
settings.commands_help: When enabled, anyone can use them from chat.

leaderboard_users.title: Leaderboard users
leaderboard_users.footer_limit: Only the first {count} users are available in the remove selector.

status.title: Status / Logs
status.description: Operational status for leaderboard updates and Riot API usage.
status.estimated_calls_value:
Next normal cycle: **{estimated}**
Last stored estimate: **{stored}**
Match history/details only refresh on new games, daily, or force.

audit.no_events_24h: No audit events in the last 24h.
audit.actor_placeholder: Discord ID, display name, or system

leaderboard.title: Solo/Duo Leaderboard
leaderboard.refresh_backoff: Leaderboard refresh blocked by Riot backoff until {time}.
leaderboard.refresh_no_summoners: Manual leaderboard refresh returned no summoners.
leaderboard.refresh_done: Leaderboard force refresh completed. Updated: {updated}. Summoners: {count}.
leaderboard.profile_fetch_failed: Could not fetch summoner profile for {summoner}

linked_accounts.already_linked_self: {summoner} is already linked to your Discord.
linked_accounts.request_refreshed: Your link request for {summoner} was refreshed. An admin must approve it.
linked_accounts.request_pending_conflict: {summoner} already has a pending link request.
linked_accounts.request_sent: Your link request for {summoner} was sent. An admin must approve it.
linked_accounts.request_no_longer_pending: That link request is no longer pending.
linked_accounts.request_user_missing: Could not find that Discord user in this server. The request was kept pending.
linked_accounts.title: Linked accounts
linked_accounts.description:
Linked Discord users: **{users}**
Linked summoners: **{summoners}**
Pending requests: **{requests}**

matchmaking.title: Matchmaking
matchmaking.fallback_random: Balance fallback: **random teams** (no valid scores cached)
matchmaking.controls_value: Use the buttons below to join, leave, open private settings, pick during captain draft, or start the match.
matchmaking.join_footer: Join requires being in a voice channel.
matchmaking.draft_active_lock: Captain draft is active; team mode changes are locked until it finishes.
matchmaking.pick_select_placeholder: Pick a player for your team
matchmaking.need_voice: You need to be in a voice channel to join the queue.
matchmaking.draft_active_join: A captain draft is already active. Wait for it to finish before joining.
matchmaking.not_in_queue: You are not in the matchmaking queue.
matchmaking.left_cancelled: You left the matchmaking queue. Captain draft cancelled.
matchmaking.left_removed: You left the matchmaking queue and were removed from the captain draft.
matchmaking.only_queued_settings: Only queued players can open matchmaking settings.
matchmaking.only_queued_change: Only queued players can change matchmaking settings.
matchmaking.only_queued_start: Only queued players can start matchmaking.
matchmaking.no_draft: No captain draft is currently active.
matchmaking.not_your_turn: It is not your turn to pick.
matchmaking.no_players_pick: There are no players left to pick.
matchmaking.choose_player: Choose a player for your team.
matchmaking.announcement_deleted: Announcement posted publicly and will be deleted in 60 seconds.
matchmaking.teams_announced_deleted: Teams announced publicly and will be deleted in 60 seconds.
matchmaking.waiting_next_pick: Waiting for the next captain pick.
matchmaking.at_least_two: At least 2 players are required to start.
matchmaking.max_ten: The queue cannot contain more than 10 players.
matchmaking.require_even: Odd player policy requires an even number of players before starting.
matchmaking.roles_need_ten: Role matching requires exactly 10 active players.
matchmaking.draft_already_active: A captain draft is already active.
matchmaking.balance_fallback_note: Balance fallback: random teams were used because no valid player scores were cached.
matchmaking.team_mode_draft_locked: Team mode cannot be changed during a captain draft.
matchmaking.team_locked_admin: Team mode is locked by administration: {lock}.
matchmaking.voice_locked_admin: Voice mode is locked by administration: {lock}.
matchmaking.team_lock_active: Team mode cannot be locked while a captain draft is active.
matchmaking.no_longer_queue: That user is no longer in the queue.
matchmaking.my_role_saved: Your matchmaking role was saved as {role}.
matchmaking.invalid_role: Invalid role. Use top, jungle, mid, adc, or support.
matchmaking.role_preferences_footer: Effective role follows the currently selected role source. History only resolves for queued linked users.
matchmaking.no_role_preferences: No role preferences or queued players found.

personal_report.title: {member} report
personal_report.no_recent_match_ids: No recent match IDs cached yet.
personal_report.no_timeline: No timeline gold data was available for this match.
personal_report.badges_footer: Badges: MVP, top damage, top gold, top vision, best KDA.
personal_report.objectives_footer: Objective values are from cached Riot match data when available.
personal_report.not_linked_me: {target} does not have a linked leaderboard account yet. Use /link_discord to request a link, or ask an admin to link one from the administration panel.

commands.matchmaking_failed: Could not create the matchmaking message. Check the configured channel and bot permissions.
commands.admin_setup_done: Administration channel set to {channel}. Message ready: {message_id}
commands.add_disabled: /add is disabled from App settings. Use the administration panel or enable the chat commands there.
commands.remove_disabled: /remove is disabled from App settings. Use the administration panel or enable the chat commands there.
commands.patch_failed: Could not fetch the latest patch notes.

persistent.admin_missing: Admin: channel not configured or missing
persistent.leaderboard_skipped: Leaderboard: skipped, no cached rank data
persistent.leaderboard_channel_moved: Leaderboard channel set to {channel}. Current embed moved.
persistent.leaderboard_channel_next: Leaderboard channel set to {channel}. The message will be created on the next leaderboard update.
persistent.matchmaking_channel_set: Matchmaking channel set to {channel}. Message ready: {message_id}
